visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) In a brightly lit Costco warehouse aisle, a young woman with long black hair, wearing a white fuzzy fleece jacket over a grey top, holds a large orange plastic bag containing several ears of yellow sweet corn. She looks directly at the camera with a bright smile and animated facial expressions, gesturing with her hands as she speaks. Behind her, stacks of green cardboard boxes filled with produce are visible on heavy-duty metal warehouse shelving under standard industrial lighting. (2) The scene shifts to a close-up tracking shot of the warehouse shelves, showing multiple brown cardboard boxes branded with 'Yumei Farm' and green boxes. The boxes contain packages of yellow corn, and some appear nearly empty, indicating high customer demand. The lighting is bright and even, characteristic of a large retail warehouse environment. (3) Returning to the woman in the white jacket, she is seen from a medium close-up angle, pointing toward her ear in a listening gesture while still holding the bag of corn. She continues to smile and engage with the camera, her movements are fluid and energetic. The background remains the same warehouse setting with green produce boxes. (4) The scene transitions to a brightly lit modern indoor home kitchen or dining area. Two women, including the one from the previous scenes, are sitting at a table. They are both holding individual vacuum-sealed yellow corn cobs. They demonstrate opening the packaging and taking large bites of the corn. They display highly exaggerated expressions of joy and satisfaction, nodding and smiling. A yellow bag of corn and a white plate are on the table in front of them against a warm, neutral-colored wall background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 為什麼你要拿一袋玉米. (2) [Slogan]: 玉美新出的黃金蜜玉米. [Variety]: 減肥神器. (3) [Subtitle]: 很漂亮耶 你還沒吃就說好吃喔. (4) [Variety]: 直接食用. [Subtitle]: 可以加熱 也可以直接吃. (5) [Subtitle]: 拿兩袋啊. (6) [Variety]: 瘋搶. [Subtitle]: 已經瘋搶 剩兩個箱子. (7) [Subtitle]: 玉美 黃金蜜玉米. 一根只要46.5塊. (8) [Slogan]: 可以防身又可以充飢. [Variety]: 優秀碳水. (9) [Subtitle]: 好好吃 它每一顆都非常的飽滿. (10) [Subtitle]: 真的很方便 推薦大家冰箱都可以有一個. [Variety]: 超級甜.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing throughout the video
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women with long dark hair, one wearing a white fleece jacket and the other in a dark green top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half takes place in a Costco warehouse with industrial shelving and produce boxes. The second half is a modern home interior with a clean table and warm lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio opens with a bright, high-tempo electronic pop BGM featuring a steady 4/4 beat and synthesizer melodies. An energetic female voice begins speaking with a high pitch and rapid speech rate, sounding very excited about a product. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect triggers precisely as a text box appears in the visual track. The female voice continues with high arousal, maintaining clarity and enthusiasm while describing the corn. (3) A soft plastic rustling sound is audible as the packaging is handled. The BGM remains consistent in volume, serving as a high-energy bed. (4) A second female voice joins in a lively conversation, creating a sense of shared excitement. There is noticeable overlapping speech as they both react to the taste of the corn. (5) A 'sparkle' sound effect and a short percussive 'hit' SFX punctuate the narrative. The voices maintain a high positive valence and intensity until the end of the recording.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Showcase -> Benefit Listing -> Tasting Test -> Recommendation.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote Yumei Farm's 'Tap Sweet Corn' available at Costco by highlighting its convenience, health benefits, and high taste quality through an energetic 'finds' and tasting vlog format.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly mentions the brand name '玉美' (Yumei Farm), shows the product packaging extensively, provides the price, and gives a strong positive recommendation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy social media promotional video utilizing fast cuts and variety-show graphics to drive product interest.
